title: Thething(origin)
description: A origin that lets you play as a "thing" from the mod Thing from another world, also has a config option that enables or disables players getting infected with the origin upon dying with the slow assimilation effect
body:
An alien parasite nearly impossible to kill.

[ R ] Reveal chest spitter: spread the infection to nearby targets
[ G ] Toggle True Form (Disguised ↔ True form)

TRUE FORM:
• Strength I (permanent)
• Regeneration (passive) (fire disables this passive)  
• 80% Damage Resistance (passive) (fire disables this passive)
REVIVAL (passive): After dying you explode into smaller things if your head survives 90 seconds you will revive at its position 
DETECTION (passive): You can distinguish disguised things 
INFECTION (passive): While in true form your attacks inflict slow assimilation to players
